verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, You are so good, Jesus, You are so, so good, There's nothing to fear 'Cause I'm here in Your presence. Jesus, You are so good, Jesus, You are so, so good, And I just want to thank You With every beat of my heart.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You've given me eternal life, And Your Word to light my way. You've given me Your Spirit And new mercies everyday.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You've given me your confidnece; and my soul is filled with peace, You are my provider You supply my every need.
